response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, Texas, employs 342 people and reported strong financial performance throughout the year. In the first quarter, the company generated $12.3 million in revenue, followed by $14.1 million in the second quarter, $11.8 million in the third, and a robust $16.2 million in the fourth, culminating in a total annual revenue of $54.4 million. This marked an impressive year-over-year growth of 18%.
